content.description: Sign-on policy evaluations, routing rule hits, MFA factor usage and failures.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>Okta: Policy Monitor</label>
    <description>Auth policy evaluations, MFA challenge triggers, and IDP-authenticated sessions.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[{"title": "Okta: Policy Monitor", "description": "Auth policy evaluations, MFA challenge triggers, and IDP-authenticated sessions.", "inputs": {"input_global_trp": {"options": {"defaultValue": "-24h@h,now", "token": "global_time"}, "title": "Time Range", "type": "input.timerange"}}, "defaults": {"dataSources": {"ds.search": {"options": {"queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}}}}, "visualizations": {"viz_policy_evals": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_policy_evals"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Policy Evaluations", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_mfa_challenges": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_mfa_challenges"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "MFA Challenges", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_challenge_rate": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_challenge_rate"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Challenge Rate %", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_policy_denies": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_policy_denies"}, "options": {"sparklineDisplay": "off", "trendDisplay": "off", "majorColor": "#c12f28"}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Policy Denies", "type": "splunk.singlevalue"}, "viz_policy_trend": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_policy_trend"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Policy Evaluations Over Time", "type": "splunk.column"}, "viz_app_rule": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_app_rule"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "Application \u00d7 Policy Rule", "type": "splunk.table"}, "viz_mfa_by_rule": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_mfa_by_rule"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "MFA Required by Policy Rule", "type": "splunk.table"}, "viz_idp_activity": {"containerOptions": {}, "dataSources": {"primary": "ds_idp_activity"}, "options": {}, "showLastUpdated": false, "showProgressBar": false, "title": "IDP-Authenticated Sessions", "type": "splunk.table"}}, "dataSources": {"ds_policy_evals": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_mfa_challenges": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | spath output=outcome path=\"outcome.result\" | where outcome=\"CHALLENGE\" | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_challenge_rate": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | spath output=outcome path=\"outcome.result\" | stats count as evals sum(eval(if(outcome=\"CHALLENGE\",1,0))) as challenges | eval rate=if(evals>0,round(challenges/evals*100,1),0) | table rate", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_policy_denies": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | spath output=outcome path=\"outcome.result\" | where outcome=\"DENY\" | stats count AS total", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_policy_trend": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | spath output=outcome path=\"outcome.result\" | eval is_challenge=if(outcome=\"CHALLENGE\",1,0) | timechart span=1d count AS Evaluations sum(is_challenge) AS \"MFA Challenges\"", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_app_rule": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | spath output=targets path=\"target{}\" | mvexpand targets | spath input=targets output=target_type path=\"type\" | spath input=targets output=target_name path=\"displayName\" | stats values(eval(if(target_type=\"AppInstance\",target_name,null()))) as App values(eval(if(target_type=\"Rule\",target_name,null()))) as Rule count as Evals sum(eval(if(outcome_result=\"CHALLENGE\",1,0))) as Challenges sum(eval(if(outcome_result=\"DENY\",1,0))) as Denies by _cd | stats sum(Evals) as Evals sum(Challenges) as Challenges sum(Denies) as Denies by App, Rule | where isnotnull(App) AND App!=\"\" | sort -Evals | rename App AS Application, Rule AS \"Policy Rule\", Evals AS Evaluations, Challenges AS \"MFA Challenges\"", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_mfa_by_rule": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=policy.evaluate_sign_on | spath output=targets path=\"target{}\" | mvexpand targets | spath input=targets output=target_type path=\"type\" | spath input=targets output=target_name path=\"displayName\" | eval cd=_cd | stats values(eval(if(target_type=\"Rule\",target_name,null()))) as Rule values(eval(if(target_type=\"AuthenticatorMethod\",target_name,null()))) as Authenticator by cd | where isnotnull(Authenticator) AND Authenticator!=\"\" | stats count as Challenges by Rule, Authenticator | sort -Challenges | rename Rule AS \"Policy Rule\"", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}, "ds_idp_activity": {"options": {"query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP | spath output=actor path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=app path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | spath output=outcome path=\"outcome.result\" | stats count as Sessions max(_time) as last_seen by actor, app, outcome | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\") | sort -Sessions | head 25 | rename actor AS User, app AS Application, outcome AS Outcome, last_seen AS \"Last Seen\"", "queryParameters": {"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$", "latest": "$global_time.latest$"}}, "type": "ds.search"}}, "layout": {"globalInputs": ["input_global_trp"], "layoutDefinitions": {"layout_1": {"options": {"display": "auto", "height": 1310, "width": 2100}, "structure": [{"item": "viz_policy_evals", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 0, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_mfa_challenges", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 520, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_challenge_rate", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 510, "x": 1040, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_policy_denies", "position": {"h": 160, "w": 540, "x": 1560, "y": 0}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_policy_trend", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 2100, "x": 0, "y": 170}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_app_rule", "position": {"h": 380, "w": 1040, "x": 0, "y": 540}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_mfa_by_rule", "position": {"h": 380, "w": 1050, "x": 1050, "y": 540}, "type": "block"}, {"item": "viz_idp_activity", "position": {"h": 360, "w": 2100, "x": 0, "y": 930}, "type": "block"}], "type": "absolute"}}, "tabs": {"items": [{"label": "Policy Monitor", "layoutId": "layout_1"}]}}}]]></definition>
    <meta type="hiddenElements"><![CDATA[
{
	"hideEdit": false,
	"hideOpenInSearch": false,
	"hideExport": false
}
    ]]></meta>
</dashboard>
content.label: Okta: Policy & MFA Monitor
